name: Gourmet Vegetables B1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chinese dried mushrooms (presoaked), finely sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a deep-fat fryer to 350°F (175°C). Add rice sticks and cook until light and crisp.
2. In a preheated wok or skillet, add 2 tablespoons vegetable oil. Bring the oil to a sizzle.
3. Add beef and toss rapidly for 1-2 minutes until half-cooked. Remove from the pan.
4. Return the beef to the pan. Add salt and all sliced ingredients (bamboo shoots, celery, dried onion, rice sticks).
5. Cook over medium-high heat, tossing and turning all ingredients for 2 minutes.
6. Add chicken stock mixed with MSG. Cover and cook over medium heat for 3 minutes.
7. Add soy sauce, sugar, and the half-cooked beef. Increase to high heat and continue to toss and cook until the sauce thickens (about 1 minute).
8. Remove from heat and immediately add the cornstarch/water paste. Toss until the sauce thickens (about 1 minute).
9. Place on a serving dish and top with crisp rice sticks.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: AVERAGE
Time: 15 minutes
